files.patch:
@@ -33,8 +33,8 @@ jobs:
     - name: Setup Swift on Windows
       uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@main
       with:
-        branch: swift-${{ matrix.swift-version }}-release
-        tag: ${{ matrix.swift-version }}-RELEASE
+        swift-version: swift-${{ matrix.swift-version }}-release
+        swift-build: ${{ matrix.swift-version }}-RELEASE
       if: runner.os == 'Windows'
         
     - name: Cache Swift Package Manager
@@ -99,8 +99,8 @@ jobs:
     - name: Setup Swift on Windows
       uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@main
       with:
-        branch: swift-6.0-release
-        tag: 6.0-RELEASE
+        swift-version: swift-6.0-release
+        swift-build: 6.0-RELEASE
       if: runner.os == 'Windows'
         
     - name: Build Examples
@@ -124,4 +124,4 @@ jobs:
       
     - name: SwiftLint
       uses: norio-nomura/action-swiftlint@3.2.1
-      continue-on-error: true # Don't fail CI on lint issues initially
\ No newline at end of file
+      continue-on-error: true # Don't fail CI on lint issues initially

@@ -97,7 +97,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Swift
         uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@main
         with:
-          swift-version: "6.0"
+          swift-version: swift-6.0-release
+          swift-build: 6.0-RELEASE
       
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
@@ -137,4 +138,4 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: cross-platform-validation
-          path: release-info.txt
\ No newline at end of file
+          path: release-info.txt

@@ -135,8 +135,8 @@ jobs:
     - name: Setup Swift
       uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@main
       with:
-        branch: swift-${{ matrix.swift-version }}-release
-        tag: ${{ matrix.swift-version }}-RELEASE
+        swift-version: swift-${{ matrix.swift-version }}-release
+        swift-build: ${{ matrix.swift-version }}-RELEASE
 
     - name: Cache Swift Package Manager
       uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -210,4 +210,4 @@ jobs:
           swift test --filter IntegrationTests
         else
           echo "Skipping integration tests - API keys not available"
-        fi
\ No newline at end of file
+        fi
